suppress.notes: CVE-2025-7962 is a Jakarta MAIL SMTP-injection vulnerability (CR/LF in message headers). The dependency-check CPE matcher misidentifies angus-activation (Eclipse Angus Activation — MIME type data-handling, transitive dep of jakarta.xml.bind / JAXB) as angus-mail because of the similar naming pattern; confidence LOW per the report. This SDK does NOT use Jakarta Mail / SMTP at all — angus-activation is pulled in for JAXB MIME-type registration only. The SMTP-injection sink does not exist in our dependency tree. Verified: `mvn dependency:tree | grep -i mail` returns nothing.
